scope: Prayer of Apollonius candidate identity review

sourceWitness.title: Armenian Zohrab Bible - New Testament (1805)
sourceWitness.inspectionMethod: PDF tail pages rendered from Archive source and visually inspected because OCR did not cleanly identify appendix headings.

visualFindings.finding: Page 734 appears to contain the close of Revelation / Apocalypse and apparatus notes.
Appendix text visually identified from heading and structure across PDF pages 735-736.
blockedClaims: current English candidate text source verified
current Hovhanessian metadata public-domain claim verified

visualFindings.finding: Appendix text visually identified by running headings corresponding to Repose/Death and John.
Appendix text visually identified by heading corresponding to Prayer/Supplication of Euthalius.
blockedClaims: Prayer of Apollonius identified as Prayer of Euthalius
current Prayer of Apollonius text source verified

visualFindings.finding: Pages following the appendix texts appear to be correction/errata/index material, not a further appendix text.

nextWork: Extract exact Armenian text/pages for 3 Corinthians, Repose of John, and Prayer of Euthalius.
